market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Bluesky now supports better quality photos
articles.description: The max size is now 2MB and max resolution is 4000x4000.

articles.title: Microsoft offers buyout for up to 7% of U.S. employees
articles.description: If a worker's years of service at Microsoft plus their age equals 70 or more, they will be eligible for a voluntary retirement buyout.

articles.title: The market repriced DeFi in just 48 hours
articles.description: Di Bartolomeo argues that last weekend the market achieved – in real time – a notable feat that no regulator, auditor or commentator has ever done.

articles.title: Era raises $11M to build a software platform for AI gadgets
articles.description: Era thinks that we will see many form factors of AI hardware, including glasses, rings, and pendants

articles.title: Meta is revamping its cross-app management system
articles.description: Meta's Accounts Center will transition to the Meta Account, which is supposed to make it easier to manage your experience on various Meta apps and devices.

articles.title: PUSD stablecoin deploys on ADI Chain, targeting $3T Islamic finance market
articles.description: The Shariah-compliant stablecoin backed by Gulf currencies expands to a new Layer-2 network aimed at institutional settlement in the Middle East.

articles.title: X is shutting down Communities because of low usage and lots of spam
articles.description: X Communities are no more. Only a fraction of X users were using Communities, and much of that use was spam, the company said.

articles.title: Bitcoin weekly close in focus after BTC price fails to revisit $80K
articles.description: Bitcoin brought its bull market support band as a key level for BTC price action to reclaim during the weekly candle close.

articles.title: Spain seizes crypto cold wallets in illegal manga piracy raid
articles.description: Spanish police seized crypto cold wallets tied to an alleged illegal manga site, as questions remain over whether officers can access the funds.

articles.title: Crypto for Advisors: AI Agents Using Crypto
articles.description: AI agents are executing transactions, forming “agentic finance.” Crypto is the financial backend for these autonomous systems. Learn use cases, risks, and what experts say.

articles.title: Salmon raises $100M in equity and debt to bring digital credit to underbanked Filipinos
articles.description: Salmon is targeting underbanked Filipinos, with little to no credit history, as well as people unhappy with the incumbent lenders' reliability issues.

articles.title: Tether freezes $344 million in USDT on Tron tied to 'illicit activity'
articles.description: The stablecoin issuer said the action followed U.S. law enforcement requests as global watchdog FATF warned of growing role of digital dollars in illicit money flows.

articles.title: JPMorgan says persistent security flaws curb DeFi’s institutional appeal
articles.description: A $20 billion hit from the KelpDAO exploit highlights systemic risks, while flat ETH-denominated growth and a shift to stablecoins point to ongoing fragility in DeFi.

articles.title: BIS warns cryptocurrency exchanges are becoming ‘shadow banks,’ and why that's a risk
articles.description: The Bank for International Settlements (BIS) released a report warning stablecoin yields and other DeFi “earn” products are bank-like services without the safeguards or insurance.

articles.title: FTX estate misses out on $3B Cursor stake value after $200K sale in 2023
articles.description: The FTX estate sold its Cursor stake for $200K in 2023, now worth $3B after a SpaceX-linked valuation surge, raising questions about bankruptcy asset sales.

articles.title: Grab a ticket today: The first StrictlyVC of 2026 kicks off in just a week in San Francisco
articles.description: StrictlyVC San Francisco is in just a week. Now’s the time to grab yourself a ticket. Join VCs and founders at Sentro Filipino Cultural Center on April 30.

articles.title: Another customer of troubled startup Delve suffered a big security incident
articles.description: TechCrunch has confirmed that Delve was the compliance company that performed the security certifications for Context AI, the AI agent training startup that last week disclosed a security incident.

articles.title: OKX accelerates US push with BitGo off-exchange settlement
articles.description: OKX integrates BitGo off-exchange settlement for US institutions, reducing pre-funding requirements and marking a key step in its US expansion following ICE investment.

articles.title: The $145 billion math: Why bitcoin’s quantum threat is manageable, not existential
articles.description: Quantum fears focus on vulnerable early wallets, but market data suggests even a worst case sell-off would be large, not catastrophic.

articles.title: Ripple-linked XRP slips amid bitcoin profit-taking, ETF delay
articles.description: Token falls 2.5% after rejection near $1.44 as leveraged ETF launch pushback adds to mixed sentiment.
